metadata.description: Blender Skills production skills for Cursor and Claude Code with Blender MCP integration

plugins.name: blender-skills
plugins.description: 23 specialized Blender skills: blender-director orchestrator, modeling disciplines (hard-surface, environment, character, creature), production workflow (sculpt, retopo, UV, materials, textures), technical skills (geometry nodes, lighting, rendering, animation, rigging), pipeline (optimization, export), and style specialists (horror, lowpoly, stylized, realistic). Includes reference-image-match workflow. Built for Blender MCP execution.
